problem: Need optional Longport premium feed integration as a higher-fidelity data tier with explicit fallback handling.

evidence.current_issue: Fallback/delayed feeds can degrade explainability and integrity confidence

required_change: Add Longport adapter with strict credential checks and rate-limit handling.
Implement source arbitration with deterministic precedence and explicit `source_tier` in output.
Add integrity test ensuring spot reference resolves consistently across tiers or fails closed.
acceptance_tests: Tier arbitration tests cover premium available/unavailable cases.
Manual proof: one run with Longport disabled falls back correctly with explicit tier label.
constraints: No hard dependency on Longport for baseline operation.
No execution if source arbitration unresolved.
No schema breaks in Telegram output.
